title: centella callioda
intro: Centella callioda, also known as Indian pennywort, is a perennial herb native to India and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Centella callioda include improved cognitive function, wound healing, and enhanced skin health, making it a popular ingredient in skincare products. Centella callioda can be consumed as a herbal tea, capsule, or applied topically as a cream or oil, making it easily accessible for those looking to harness its benefits.
